div.head: The Ambassador in Mexico (Daniels) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
400. Referring to my telegram number 397 of October 6, 6 p.m.,Not printed. Supreme Court decided on October 8Cía. Mexicana de Petróleo, “El Aguila,” S. A. y coagas., Núm. 4368 de 1938, Sec. 2a, Mexico, Semanario Judicial de la Federación, vol. lviii, No. 2, October 6–13, 1938 (Mexico, 1939), pp. 354–364. not to take action on question
of constitutionality of decree of March 18 and expropriation law of 1936. Basis of decision was that executive power had not as yet resolved the appeal entered with administrative authorities by the companies against the expropriation action. See third paragraph my telegram number 390 of September 29, 1938.Not printed. Air mail despatch follows.
